description: The Polimeni are a 'ndrina (organized crime clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Oppido Mamertina, Italy. They are allied with the Mazzagatti and Bonarrigo clans. From 1992 to 1998 they were involved in a feud with the Ferraro-Raccosta clan, which reignited around 2011. In 2013, the Erinni operation led to arrests and asset seizures, potentially ending the violence.

country_links.evidence_quote: Per gli omicidi vengono anche chiamate componenti della famiglia residenti a Roma , in cui le 'ndrine hanno alcune attività ora sequestrati dalle forze dell'ordine, tra cui Simone Pepe .
country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Polimeni has members and activities in Rome, Italy.
